newKeys.description: Subtitle shown when a fast is active. {elapsed} is a formatted time string like '3h 20m'.

newKeys.value: A preview of the metabolic stages of a fast.
newKeys.description: Subtitle shown in preview mode (no active fast).

newKeys.value: Start a fast to see your live timeline with the exact clock time each stage is reached.
newKeys.description: Hint shown when no fast is active, encouraging user to start one.

newKeys.value: Everything you need to fast confidently — what it is, how it works, and what happens in your body.
newKeys.description: Subtitle under the Fasting Guide screen header.

newKeys.value: Swipe through what happens hour by hour — from your last meal all the way to a 30-day fast.
newKeys.description: Description below 'The fasting timeline' header in the fasting guide.
Section header label for the FAQ accordion in the fasting guide.

newKeys.value: Stop fasting and eat if you feel dizzy, faint, shaky, or unwell. Fasts beyond 24 hours need extra attention to electrolytes, and fasts beyond 72 hours should only be done under medical supervision. Fasting is not a substitute for medical care — this guide is educational and not medical advice.
newKeys.description: Safety guidance body text in the fasting guide.
